CONTENT.History: Nicknamed Los Tiburones (the Sharks), the team won 5 league titles, the most recent one in 2014.
CONTENT.Honours: Campeonato Nacional de Fútbol de Cuba: 51993, 2001, 2003, 2010, 2014
CONTENT.Current squad: 2018 SeasonNote: Flags indicate national team as defined under FIFA eligibility rules. Players may hold more than one non-FIFA nationality.

SUMMARY: FC Ciego de Ávila is a Cuban football team playing in the Cuban National Football League and representing Ciego de Ávila Province. They play their home games at Sergio Alonso Grandal in Morón.
